pokemon:stonjourner.name: Stonjourner
pokemon:stonjourner.summary: Once a year, on a specific date and at a specific time, they gather out of nowhere and form up in a circle.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Once a year, on a specific date and at a specific time, they gather out of nowhere and form up in a circle.
It stands in grasslands, watching the sun’s descent from zenith to horizon. This Pokémon has a talent for delivering dynamic kicks.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Once a year, on a specific date and at a specific time, they gather out of nowhere and form up in a circle.
